title: The Midnight Flyer
writer: J. Grubb Alexander, Arthur Guy Empey
actors: Cullen Landis, Dorothy Devore, Charles A. Post
plot: Si Henderson is the only mountaineer to get a job with the railroad when it starts coming through the West Virginia mountains. This development incurs the wrath of Jeb Slater, who keeps alive the century-old feud between the Slate...
